notes: Inferred from 2021 'My Play' — Known Agenda to win and show, Hot Rod Charlie to win and show, Sainthood/Helium called the best super long-shot horses.
analysis: Essential Quality is the best horse, but nowhere near worth the price. Struggling between Known Agenda and Hot Rod Charlie. Like O Besos or King Fury as mid-tier flyers to hit the board. Sainthood and Helium are the best super-long-shot horses.
betting_plays:
Known Agenda to Win and Show
Hot Rod Charlie to Win and Show

Exacta Box: 1/9 – 1/9 (2 lines, $10 each)
Trifecta: 1/9 – 6/16/5 – 1/9 (6 lines, $2 each)
Superfecta: 1/9 – 1/9 – 6/5/16 – 6/5/16 (18 lines, $1 each)

Key numbers
1 — Known Agenda
5 — Sainthood
6 — O Besos
9 — Hot Rod Charlie
16 — King Fury

horses.name: Known Agenda
horses.note: drawing the first post will work in his favor — closer who won't burn energy early

horses.name: Hot Rod Charlie
horses.note: really high on him; comes down to the break between speed horses

horses.name: Essential Quality
horses.note: best horse on paper but not worth 2-1

horses.name: O Besos
horses.note: closer-type. Could be better than odds suggest. Trifecta-back-end material

horses.name: King Fury
horses.note: strong workouts; surrounded by speed in his post

horses.name: Highly Motivated
horses.note: fast horse, only lost to Essential Quality by a neck

horses.name: Sainthood
horses.note: by far the best of the long-shot horses

horses.name: Helium
horses.note: has good late speed splits, undefeated, intriguing price

horses.name: Like the King
horses.note: won't hit the board, but won't be last

horses.name: Medina Spirit
horses.note: Bob Baffert horse — doesn't have endurance to close

horses.name: Mandaloun
horses.note: inconsistent — last race shit the bed

horses.name: Rock Your World
horses.note: lightly raced, will need to come from behind

horses.name: Soup and Sandwich
horses.note: speed horse stuck in 19th post; people pick him because of the name

horses.name: Bourbonic
horses.note: won a slow race to qualify
